raw_consumer_statement: This was a purchase that was canceled on XX/XX/year>, and I received a cancellation email from the XXXX XXXX. It is listed as a pending transaction since then and will not drop off my account statement. I have made numerous calls to the Executive Response unit at Citibank even with representatives from the Presidents office at the XXXX XXXX on the line with me to try to resolve this and the analyst XXXX is never available to take the call.
